value_chain_position: High-speed interconnect and broadband silicon — sells PAM4/coherent DSPs for data-center optical links and xPON chips for broadband access.
relative_comps: MXL's 3-year revenue CAGR is deeply negative (-25%) — the broadband trough crushed the base — but the 41% YoY rebound signals recovery, not secular disruption leadership. FCF margin of only 2% is the weakest in the peer set and the near-zero absolute FCF ($10M) means any macro wobble erases it. CRDO and MRVL dominate the high-speed AI-interconnect segment where MXL competes; MXL's scale disadvantage is real. Theme fit is genuine but conviction is tempered by the margin trough and lack of proven AI-workload wins at hyperscaler scale.
